text: Tip: Say 'How is my BP this week' to get a 7-day summary.
Tip: Say 'My BP is 120 over 80' to save a pressure reading.
Tip: Say 'My sugar is 145 after food' to log sugar quickly.
Tip: Say 'Open medicines' to see your tablet list.
Tip: Say 'Add medicine' when you get a new prescription.
Tip: Say 'What medicine is pending?' to check today's doses.
Tip: Say 'Did I take my tablet?' to ask about medicine status.
Tip: Say 'Open periods' to go to women's health tracking.
Tip: Say 'My period started today' to log a period start.
Tip: Say 'When was my last period?' to check saved logs.
Tip: Say 'Scan prescription' to open the prescription scanner.
Tip: Say 'Open doctor visit' to prepare a doctor summary.
Tip: Say 'Health summary' to hear a short saved-log overview.
Tip: Say 'Open family care' to manage family medicines.
Tip: Say 'Family medicines' to jump to family care.
Tip: Say 'Open settings' to change app preferences.
Tip: Say 'Health journey' to open your progress timeline.
Tip: Say 'Check-in today' to open the daily wellness check-in.
Tip: You can say 'sar dard hai' to log headache.
Tip: You can say 'tension kaisa hai' to ask about BP.
Tip: You can say 'goli kaunsa lena hai' to ask medicine timing.
Tip: Say 'How was my week?' for a gentle health recap.
Tip: Say 'Doctor visit' before an appointment.
Tip: Say 'Medicine schedule' to ask about upcoming tablets.
Tip: Say 'Help' anytime to hear what I can do.
